title: Mississippi River drought — barge traffic paralysis
historical_analogue: 2012 Mississippi River drought (record low water), 2022 drought (barge capacity -25%)
description: Extreme drought drops the Mississippi River to historic lows. Barge traffic — carrying 60% of US grain exports — comes to near-standstill. Farmers cannot move crops to Gulf ports. ADM, Cargill, Bunge face massive logistics crises.
